ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "is_preferred" INTEGER /* Indicates if the vendor is preferred */,
  "has_master" INTEGER /* Indicates if the vendor has a master contract */,
  "consulting_only" INTEGER /* Indicates if the vendor is for consulting services only */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the vendor record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the vendor record was created */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for the primary contact at the vendor organization */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the primary contact at the vendor organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the vendor */,
  "rating" REAL /* Vendor rating based on performance metrics */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who last updated the vendor record */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the vendor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vendor associated with the contract */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of the contract document (e.g., Managed Team, Professional Services) */,
  "analyst_j" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contract is assigned to an analyst */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the contract */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the contract */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizational unit */,
  "change_order" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contract has a change order */,
  "scaled_c_total" REAL /* Scaled total cost of the contract */,
  "scaled_amount" REAL /* Scaled amount of the contract */,
  "submitted_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract was submitted */,
  "system_entered_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract was entered into the system */,
  "contract_execute_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract was executed */,
  "prelim_days" INTEGER /* Number of days for preliminary review */,
  "system_days" INTEGER /* Number of days in the system */,
  "total_days" INTEGER /* Total number of days for contract execution */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract is scheduled to start */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract is scheduled to end */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract can be renewed */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Status of the contract renewal (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Terms of payment for the contract */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Total value of the contract */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who last updated the contract record */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_doc_type FOREIGN KEY ("doc_type") REFERENCES contract_types ("doc_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_types" (
  "doc_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract type */,
  "doc_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the contract type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contract type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contract type is active */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who last updated the contract type record */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Procurement Officer, Financial Analyst, Department Head) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who last updated the user record */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organizational unit */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organizational unit */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organizational unit */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the organizational unit */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the organizational unit */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who last updated the organizational unit record */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the organizational unit record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is active */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who last updated the role record */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Submitted, Approved, Executed) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was recorded */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes related to the status */,
  "status_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who recorded the status */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who last updated the status record */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the status record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_status_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric (e.g., Scaled Total, Scaled Amount) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the financial metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the financial metric (e.g., Internal, External) */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who last updated the financial metric record */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial metric record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract */,
  "doc_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "doc_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was uploaded */,
  "document_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document in bytes */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who last updated the document record */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the document record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_documents_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendor_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., On-time Delivery, Quality Score) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the performance metric (e.g., Internal, External) */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who last updated the performance metric record */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance metric record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_performance_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Name of the action (e.g., Create Contract, Update Vendor) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the action */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who last updated the log entry */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
